title: Templating Engines Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of EJS/Pug/Handlebars roles, setting up the 'view engine' in Express, and using res.render for professional dynamic HTML generation.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the primarily role of a 'Templating Engine' in an Express.js application?
options: To combine HTML templates with dynamic data (like a user's name or product list) from the server to generate final HTML pages.
To hide the JavaScript code from the console.

questions.question: Which popular templating engine uses standard HTML with embedded JavaScript tags (e.g., <%= user.name %>)?
Which Express method is used to render a template and send the final HTML to the user?
Which and/or what line of code is commonly used in Express to set the 'view engine' to EJS?
Does using a templating engine allowing the use of millions of pre-built packages and libraries to handle complex dynamic UI generation?
options: Yes, as it is a core feature of most modern web frameworks to support dynamic views.
